# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure Function App
    minLength: 2
    maxLength: 60
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure region for all resources
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Storage Account the Function App needs access to
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault for secret retrieval
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Cosmos DB account
  appServicePlanSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Y1
    allowedValues:
      - Y1
      - EP1
      - EP2
      - EP3
    metadata:
      description: App Service Plan SKU for consumption or premium
  cosmosDbDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Cosmos DB database for scoped access
  cosmosDbContainerNames:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: List of Cosmos DB container names the function needs access to

variables:
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------
  # SECURITY NOTE: We use the NARROWEST built-in roles possible.
  #
  # REJECTED broad roles such as:
  #   - Owner (8e3af657-...)
  #   - Contributor (b24988ac-...)
  #   - Storage Account Contributor (17d1049b-...)
  #   - Cosmos DB Account Reader Role (fbdf93bf-...) -- account-wide
  #
  # Instead we assign:
  #   - Storage Blob Data Reader (not Contributor) unless writes needed
  #   - Key Vault Secrets User (not Administrator/Officer)
  #   - Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor scoped to specific DB
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------

  # Storage Blob Data Reader - read-only access to blob containers
  # If the function must WRITE blobs, change to Storage Blob Data Contributor
  storageBlobDataReaderRoleId: 2a2b9908-6ea1-4ae2-8e65-a410df84e7d1

  # Storage Queue Data Contributor - needed for Function trigger bindings
  storageQueueDataContributorRoleId: 974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88

  # Storage Table Data Reader - read access to table storage
  storageTableDataReaderRoleId: 76199698-9eea-4c19-bc75-cec21354c6b6

  # Key Vault Secrets User - read-only access to secrets (NOT Officer/Administrator)
  keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId: 4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6

  # Key Vault Crypto User - use keys for encrypt/decrypt (NOT Officer)
  # Only include if the function needs cryptographic operations
  # keyVaultCryptoUserRoleId: 12338af0-0e69-4776-bea7-57ae8d297424

  # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor - read/write items in Cosmos DB
  # Scoped to specific database, NOT account level
  cosmosDbBuiltInDataContributorRoleId: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002

  appServicePlanName: "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]"
  functionStorageAccountName: "[concat('fnstore', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"

  # Unique names for role assignments (must be deterministic GUIDs)
  storageBlobRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'), parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  storageQueueRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'), parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  storageTableRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageTableDataReaderRoleId'), parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  keyVaultRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'), parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

  # Function app internal storage role assignments
  fnStorageBlobRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'), variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
  fnStorageQueueRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'), variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"

resources:
  # =====================================================
  # Function App Internal Storage Account
  # (Separate from the data storage account)
  # =====================================================
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[variables('functionStorageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      allowSharedKeyAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
          file:
            enabled: true
          queue:
            enabled: true
          table:
            enabled: true
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage

  # =====================================================
  # App Service Plan (Consumption or Premium)
  # =====================================================
  - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[variables('appServicePlanName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('appServicePlanSku')]"
    properties:
      reserved: true
    kind: linux

  # =====================================================
  # Function App with System-Assigned Managed Identity
  # =====================================================
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: functionapp,linux
    identity:
      # System-assigned identity: lifecycle tied to the Function App
      # No credentials to manage, rotate, or leak
      type: SystemAssigned
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      clientAffinityEnabled: false
      siteConfig:
        linuxFxVersion: dotnet-isolated|8.0
        minTlsVersion: "1.2"
        ftpsState: Disabled
        http20Enabled: true
        # SECURITY: No plaintext secrets in app settings
        # All secrets referenced via Key Vault references
        appSettings:
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName
            # Identity-based connection - no connection string needed
            value: "[variables('functionStorageAccountName')]"
          - name: FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION
            value: ~4
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet-isolated
          # Key Vault reference for any secrets that must be in app settings
          # Format: @Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=https://{vault}.vault.azure.net/secrets/{name}/)
          - name: CosmosDb__AccountEndpoint
            value: "[concat('https://', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '.documents.azure.com:443/')]"
          - name: CosmosDb__DatabaseName
            value: "[parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName')]"
          # SQL connection using Managed Identity - NO password
          - name: SqlConnectionString
            value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Database=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;')]"
          - name: KeyVaultUri
            value: "[concat('https://', parameters('keyVaultName'), '.vault.azure.net/')]"
          # SECURITY: Disable shared key access for storage
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage__credential
            value: managedidentity

  # =====================================================
  # ROLE ASSIGNMENTS - Scoped to specific resources
  # SECURITY: Each assignment uses the narrowest role
  # =====================================================

  # --- Storage Blob Data Reader on the DATA storage account ---
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageBlobRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Grants ', parameters('functionAppName'), ' read-only blob access to ', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  # --- Storage Queue Data Contributor on the DATA storage account ---
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageQueueRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Grants ', parameters('functionAppName'), ' queue access for trigger bindings on ', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  # --- Storage Table Data Reader on the DATA storage account ---
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageTableRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageTableDataReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Grants ', parameters('functionAppName'), ' read-only table access to ', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  # --- Function App internal storage: Blob Data Owner (needed for AzureWebJobsStorage) ---
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('fnStorageBlobRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      # Storage Blob Data Owner is required for the Functions runtime internal storage
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b7e6dc6d-f1e8-4753-8033-0f276bb0955b')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Grants ', parameters('functionAppName'), ' blob owner on its internal storage account')]"

  # --- Function App internal storage: Queue Data Contributor ---
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('fnStorageQueueRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('functionStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Grants ', parameters('functionAppName'), ' queue access on its internal storage account')]"

  # --- Key Vault Secrets User (read-only secrets) ---
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('keyVaultRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[concat('Grants ', parameters('functionAppName'), ' read-only secret access to ', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

  # --- Cosmos DB: Scoped SQL Role Assignment per container ---
  # SECURITY: Cosmos DB uses its own RBAC system, scoped to database level
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2023-04-15"
    name: "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/', guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'cosmos-data-contributor', parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName')))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleDefinitions', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), variables('cosmosDbBuiltInDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      # SECURITY: Scoped to specific database, NOT the entire account
      scope: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), '/dbs/', parameters('cosmosDbDatabaseName'))]"

  # =====================================================
  # SQL Server - AAD Admin and Firewall
  # SECURITY: SQL access via AAD/Entra ID, no SQL auth
  # NOTE: The Function App's managed identity must be added
  # as a user in the SQL database via T-SQL:
  #   CREATE USER [functionAppName] FROM EXTERNAL PROVIDER;
  #   ALTER ROLE db_datareader ADD MEMBER [functionAppName];
  #   ALTER ROLE db_datawriter ADD MEMBER [functionAppName];
  # =====================================================

  # =====================================================
  # Diagnostic Settings - Audit trail for security
  # =====================================================
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites/providers/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: "2021-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/security-audit')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      logs:
        - category: FunctionAppLogs
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
        - category: AppServiceAuthenticationLogs
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90

outputs:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
  functionAppPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
  functionAppDefaultHostName:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01').defaultHostName]"
  securityNotes:
    type: string
    value: "IMPORTANT: (1) Run T-SQL to grant the managed identity db_datareader/db_datawriter roles in SQL Database. (2) Review role assignments periodically. (3) No connection strings or secrets are stored in plaintext."
  roleAssignmentSummary:
    type: object
    value:
      storage_data_account:
        blobAccess: Storage Blob Data Reader (read-only)
        queueAccess: Storage Queue Data Contributor (trigger bindings)
        tableAccess: Storage Table Data Reader (read-only)
      storage_internal_account:
        blobAccess: Storage Blob Data Owner (Functions runtime requirement)
        queueAccess: Storage Queue Data Contributor (Functions runtime requirement)
      keyVault:
        secretAccess: Key Vault Secrets User (read-only)
      cosmosDb:
        dataAccess: Built-in Data Contributor (scoped to specific database only)
      sqlDatabase:
        dataAccess: Via Entra ID authentication (db_datareader + db_datawriter via T-SQL)
